How sharing works: your hunter opens Scavenger & Hunt Co. on their phone, taps Join a Hunt, and enters this case number. The board loads automatically. Add this app to your Home Screen so it's easy to reopen.

File the Territory

Every Cold Case belongs to a public territory. A ZIP code is required; if the grounds are a National or State Park, name the park and its city.
